title: Modern Digital Maximalism Sports Collage AI
sourceTitle: Modern Digital Maximalism Sports Collage AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Modern digital maximalism sports collage featuring Los Angeles Lakers and LeBron James imagery with contemporary campaign energy inspired by Nike marketing campaigns. Subject: LeBron James and Los Angeles Lakers visual elements become the emotional sports hero content, surrounded by grainy textures, bold abstract geometric forms, dynamic grid panels, and minimal background space. Scene: Clean minimal background supports bold sports graphic rhythm, allowing the team/player imagery, typography-like shapes, and editorial grid structure to dominate without visual clutter. Composition: Dynamic grid layout with layered cutouts, bold abstract geometric forms, grainy textures, strong diagonal rhythm, balanced negative space, and high-impact sports-campaign hierarchy. Signature Elements: Preserved modern digital maximalism sports collage source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Contemporary editorial sports graphic design, Nike-style marketing inspiration when selected, modern digital maximalism, film-grain post-processing, cinematic color grading, and intense emotional campaign finish. Color Palette: Cinematic color-graded team tones, bold abstract accent colors, clean background neutrals, grain-texture blacks, and high-contrast graphic overlays. Lighting: Posterized sports lighting, cinematic highlight/shadow grading, intense rim accents on player imagery, and polished campaign contrast. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

imagePrompts.title: Modern Digital Maximalism Sports Collage Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Modern digital maximalism sports collage featuring Brazil national football team and Vinicius Junior imagery with contemporary campaign energy inspired by Nike football campaign language. Subject: Vinicius Junior and Brazil national football team visual elements become the emotional sports hero content, surrounded by torn photo layers, oversized circles, diagonal bars, halftone grain, and cinematic match cutouts. Scene: Clean minimal background supports bold sports graphic rhythm, allowing the team/player imagery, typography-like shapes, and editorial grid structure to dominate without visual clutter. Composition: Dynamic grid layout with layered cutouts, bold abstract geometric forms, grainy textures, strong diagonal rhythm, balanced negative space, and high-impact sports-campaign hierarchy. Signature Elements: Preserved modern digital maximalism sports collage source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Contemporary editorial sports graphic design, Nike-style marketing inspiration when selected, modern digital maximalism, film-grain post-processing, cinematic color grading, and intense emotional campaign finish. Color Palette: Cinematic color-graded team tones, bold abstract accent colors, clean background neutrals, grain-texture blacks, and high-contrast graphic overlays. Lighting: Posterized sports lighting, cinematic highlight/shadow grading, intense rim accents on player imagery, and polished campaign contrast. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
